behaviors.reasoning: This behavior validates validator-to-orchestrator handoff: required fields must be checked and downstream processing must be gated, which a pure unit test can miss.
This behavior is deterministic local logic at a single function/object boundary; lower than Unit is not applicable.
This behavior depends on real OS/network/subprocess or external-service behavior, so in-process fakes are insufficient.
